description: Fix critical issues from semantic review: (1) Answer distribution in question bank - redistribute answers equally across A/B/C/D, (2) Question duplication on page refresh - add idempotency check, (3) Admin exam detail broken - fix JOIN to use ai_questions, (4) Timer resets on backward navigation - track per-question time, (5) Load face-api.js from CDN, (6) Camera enforcement - disable exam form when camera fails.
steps: Fix app/question_bank.py - Shuffle options for each question to redistribute correct answers roughly equally across A/B/C/D (about 250 each).
Fix app/routers/exam.py get_questions() - Add idempotency check before inserting questions. If questions already exist for exam_id in ai_questions, return those instead of inserting new ones.
Fix app/routers/admin.py view_exam_detail() - Update the query to join through ai_questions table, same pattern as the exam_result endpoint.
Fix static/js/exam.js - Track per-question remaining time in an array, save it when navigating away, restore it when navigating back.
Fix templates/exam_questions.html - Add CDN script for face-api.js. When camera fails, add pointer-events:none to exam form and disable radio inputs.
Fix static/js/eye_detection.js - Update to use CDN-loaded face-api with TinyFaceDetector that works without separate model files.
acceptance_criteria: Answer distribution across A/B/C/D is roughly equal (200-300 each)
Admin exam detail page shows correct question data for new-format exams
Timer does not reset when navigating between questions
Exam form is disabled when camera is not active
verification: Run: python -c "from app.question_bank import QUESTION_BANK; from collections import Counter; c = Counter(q['correct_answer'] for q in QUESTION_BANK); print(c); assert all(200 <= v <= 300 for v in c.values())"
